# MuleSoft Microsoft Outlook 365 Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.3) of Microsoft Outlook 365 Connector documentation.
> See [Microsoft Outlook 365 Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-outlook-365-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Microsoft Outlook 365 Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Microsoft Outlook 365 Connector 1.3](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-outlook-365-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Microsoft Outlook 365 1.3 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-outlook-365-connector/latest/microsoft-outlook-365-connector-examples.md)
- [Microsoft Outlook 365 Connector 1.3 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-outlook-365-connector/latest/microsoft-outlook-365-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Microsoft Outlook 365 Connector 1.3](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-outlook-365-connector/latest/microsoft-outlook-365-connector-studio.md)
- [Microsoft Outlook 365 Connector 1.3 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-outlook-365-connector/latest/microsoft-outlook-365-connector-xml-maven.md)
